name: Palindrome check (alphanumeric)
task: Create /tmp/eval_pal/pal.py with is_palindrome(s) that returns True if s is a palindrome considering only alphanumeric characters and ignoring case. Empty string is a palindrome.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_pal/pal.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); P = mod.is_palindrome; assert P('A man a plan a canal Panama'); assert P('racecar'); assert not P('hello'); assert P(''); print('OK')
